captions.formal: A time-lapse captures vehicles traveling along a multi-lane urban street lined with autumn trees and high-rise buildings.
captions.sarcastic: Oh fantastic, watching cars blur past in a time-lapse is exactly the thrilling content my commute needed today.
captions.humorous_tech: These cars are stuck in a massive deadlock on the multi-lane highway while the traffic lights keep signaling green.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Watching this rush hour traffic feels like waiting in the school pickup line while autumn leaves mock your patience.

captions.formal: A ginger kitten walks forward through green foliage on a dirt path toward the camera.
captions.sarcastic: Oh sure, just casually strolling through the jungle like you own the place, tiny orange explorer.
captions.humorous_tech: This ginger kitten walking through branches is like a junior dev pushing to production without code review.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This little orange kitten marching through the bushes like it's late for a very important playdate.

captions.formal: A woman types on a keyboard while working at a computer monitor in a modern office.
captions.sarcastic: Oh look, another person pretending that typing furiously equals actual productivity at the office.
captions.humorous_tech: Her keyboard is getting more git commits than my entire repo this sprint.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She's typing so fast her coffee probably went cold three meetings ago.
